title: Gently Broiled British Shrimp Skewers
description: A lazy Sunday dish featuring succulent shrimp, this recipe is perfect for a relaxing British-inspired meal, with an ayurvedic-rajasic friendly twist.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Place the skewers on a broiler pan lined with aluminum foil.
Broil the shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the shrimp skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
